title: apinagia surumuensis
intro: Apinagia surumuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Suriname. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have potential benefits in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, and its health benefits may include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Apinagia surumuensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have been used in various traditional medicine practices in the region where it is found.
